TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Mepuwal, title = Mepuwal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mepuwal} }

S.FORM: Mepuwal Itiniay i Tai'an Cen no Miaoli ko Mepuwal a niyaro', 55 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 177 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 165 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 12 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 89%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Paiwan 1%, Seediq 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: məpo~u~uwaɾ itiniaj i taiʡan ʦən no~u miao~uɾi ko~u məpo~u~uwaɾ a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, amis *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, paiwan *%, səəɬ~ɮi* *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Mepuwal Itiniay i Tai'an Cen no Miaoli ko Mepuwal a niyaro', 55 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 177 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 165 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 12 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 89%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Paiwan 1%, Seediq 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: məpo~u~uwaɾ itiniaj i taiʡan ʦən no~u miao~uɾi ko~u məpo~u~uwaɾ a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, amis *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, paiwan *%, səəɬ~ɮi* *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
